reset_password_success: Password updated. You can now sign in.
collector_subtitle: Enter your email and the access code provided by the parent.

collector_pin_subtitle: Enter your PIN to access your authorizations.

welcome_subtitle: A few important points before you start
welcome_data_body: We only collect the data necessary for the service: name, email, phone, and profile photos. No data is sold or shared with third parties. Securely hosted via Supabase (EU).
welcome_children_body: Information entered about children is strictly reserved for managing their pickups. It is only accessible to people explicitly authorized by the parent.
welcome_notif_body: Push notifications are used exclusively to inform you of events related to your account. You can disable them at any time.
welcome_delete_body: You can permanently delete your account and all your data from Profile → Security.
welcome_rgpd_body: Processing compliant with GDPR (EU) 2016/679. You have the right to access, modify, and delete your data. Contact: contact@securi-click.com
parent_login_desc: Sign in to manage your children's safety.
parent_register_desc: Secure your family's digital space in minutes.
parent_register_social_proof: "Join over 10,000 parents who trust Securi'Click to protect their children."
school_login_desc_short: Manage your school's security with ease.
school_confirm_sent_to: A confirmation link has been sent to
school_confirm_body: Click the link in the email to activate your account and access your dashboard.
forgot_password_sent_body: A reset link has been sent to
forgot_password_sent_body2: Click the link in the email to create your new password.
forgot_password_desc_long: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_password_error_rate: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
forgot_password_error_generic: Something went wrong. Check your email and try again.
reset_password_desc_long: Choose a secure password of at least 8 characters.
reset_password_updated_body: Your password has been changed successfully.
reset_error_expired: This link has expired. Request a new reset link.
reset_error_same: This password is the same as the old one. Please choose a new one.
reset_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
school_address_hint: Enter the official address of your institution for certification.

register_error: Could not create account. Please try again.

error_link_expired: Link expired or already used. Request a new one.
error_pin_locked: Too many attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
error_account_not_found: No account found with this email.

legal_parent_summary: Your parent account lets you manage your children's pickups safely.
